inputs.label: Project Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of concrete needed for the project. Based on ASTM C94 standard for ready-mixed concrete.

inputs.label: Bag Size
inputs.businessContext: Standard bag sizes available in the market. Common sizes per EN 197-1.

inputs.label: Mix Ratio (cement:sand:aggregate)
inputs.businessContext: Standard concrete mix ratios per ACI 211.1. 1:2:4 is common for general use.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Expected material waste due to spillage, over-excavation, etc. Typical range 5-10% per industry practice.

inputs.label: Cement Density
inputs.businessContext: Bulk density of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ per ASTM C188.

inputs.label: Sand Density
inputs.businessContext: Bulk density of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³ per ASTM C29.

inputs.label: Aggregate Density
inputs.businessContext: Bulk density of coarse aggregate. Typically 1500 kg/m³ per ASTM C29.

inputs.label: Water-Cement Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Water to cement ratio by weight. Affects strength and workability. Per ACI 318, typical 0.4-0.6.

inputs.label: Cost per Bag
inputs.businessContext: Unit cost of one bag of cement. Market price varies.

inputs.label: Sand Cost per Tonne
inputs.businessContext: Cost of sand per metric tonne. Local market price.

inputs.label: Aggregate Cost per Tonne
inputs.businessContext: Cost of coarse aggregate per metric tonne. Local market price.

inputs.label: Water Cost per m³
inputs.businessContext: Cost of water per cubic meter. Utility rate.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for construction labor. Varies by region.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per m³
inputs.businessContext: Estimated labor hours required to mix and place one cubic meter of concrete. Based on industry benchmarks.

inputs.label: Equipment Cost per m³
inputs.businessContext: Cost of mixer, vibrator, etc. per m³. Includes depreciation and fuel.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

thresholds.wasteFactor > 10: High waste factor may indicate inefficiency.
thresholds.waterCementRatio > 0.6: High water-cement ratio may reduce strength.
thresholds.laborHoursPerM3 > 5: High labor hours indicate low productivity.

suggestedActions: wasteFactor > 10 ? 'Reduce waste by improving handling and formwork.' : ''
waterCementRatio > 0.6 ? 'Use water-reducing admixture to lower w/c ratio.' : ''
laborHoursPerM3 > 5 ? 'Consider using concrete pump or pre-mix to reduce labor.' : ''
